title: I Asked the Prophet ﷺ
short_description: A transformative journey built on one simple question: If the Prophet ﷺ were with us today, what should we ask him in order to be saved? A 30-year compilation of Prophetic answers to the most important questions a human can ask.

title: Fiqh of Hajj: A Complete Guide to Performing Hajj
short_description: Everything you need to know before you stand at Arafat. A comprehensive guide to the rulings and practices of Hajj.

title: Tafseer of the Qur'an
short_description: A journey into how the Qur'an reveals itself — verse by verse, layer by layer. Develops the method and mindset of tafseer: how to read revelation as both guidance and transformation.

title: Weekly: Life of The Prophet ﷺ
short_description: The life of our beloved Prophet Muhammad ﷺ is a perfect guide for every role we fulfil. Dive deep into the Seerah and connect with the life of the Greatest Man to walk the earth.

title: Family In The Qur'an
short_description: Stories of families from the Qur'an. Devoted fathers, heartbroken parents, disloyal spouses. Learn what builds a family, and what tears one apart.

title: Dhikr and Flicker
short_description: A practical and transformative journey into Dhikr (remembrance) and du'a (supplication) with Shaykh Sulayman Van Ael.

title: The Rulings of Marriage
short_description: A course on the rulings of marriage and family life: the rights, responsibilities, procedures and rulings every Muslim should know before, during and after the nikkah.

title: Zakat Made Easy: 4 Week Course
short_description: The principles, calculations, and rulings of Zakat, designed to help you fulfil one of Islam's greatest acts of worship with confidence.

title: Juz Amma Tafseer
short_description: A collection of Tafseer classes exploring the meaning of the Surahs in the last chapter of the Quran, based on the Tafseer by Imam Razi (RA).

title: Why History Matters
short_description: Dr Yakoob Ahmed reframes time, progress, and modernity through Qur'an, the cosmos, and the patterns of history, calling Muslims to think and act with iman and generational vision.

title: Clarifying Misconceptions — Matters of Faith
short_description: Practical steps on how to approach the challenges and difficulties we face in modern life, based on the Quran and Sunnah, with action-orientated remedies for real circumstances.

title: Weekly: Fiqh — Islamic Rulings
short_description: Fiqh is the way Muslims understand and follow Islamic rules and teachings. This weekly class helps you know what is right and wrong based on Islamic law.

title: Monthly History of Islam & The Modern Times
short_description: A broad sweep of the major historical personalities, events and processes of the Islamic Age — from the High Caliphate Period through to the Great Empires.

title: Divine Names of Allah — Compass of the Traveller
short_description: The Divine Names taught from a linguistic and spiritual-practical point of view, divided into 16 categories to help you connect with each Name's meaning and impact on your life.

title: Tafsir of Surah Yaseen
short_description: A 5 hour immersive tafsir course on Surah Ya-Seen, using Ibn Ashur's powerful commentary to unlock meaning, reflection, and spiritual clarity.

title: The Art of Intentions — Compass of the Traveller
short_description: The fiqh of pure intentions — ikhlas. The intention is the core of our deeds; without it we are bodies without souls. A course on building sincerity in worship and daily life.

title: Essential Muslim Beliefs
short_description: An in-depth journey through Islamic theology rooted in the Maturidi tradition, equipping you with the intellectual tools to understand and defend your faith with clarity and confidence.

title: The World of the Angels — Compass of The Traveller
short_description: Moving beyond abstract belief to show how understanding the mala'ika shapes the way we live, think, and connect with Allah. Belief in angels strengthens identity and protects the heart.

title: Minhaj al-Abideen: A Guide to Spiritual Success
short_description: Al-Ghazali's final book charts the pitfalls and obstacles to overcome on the path to Paradise. A guide for seekers of eternal life to resist hindrances and find salvation.

title: Aqeedah Tahawi: Foundations of Faith
short_description: Imam al-Tahawi's classic creed explains the core beliefs of Islam clearly — covering God, the Prophets, life after death, and the essential pillars of Islamic belief.

title: Ihya Uloom ud Deen
short_description: Imam Al-Ghazali's cornerstone of Islamic spirituality. A journey to embody sincerity, knowledge, and self-purification — reviving the soul and aligning actions with intentions.

title: The Meaning and Message of Surah Al-Buruj
short_description: An exploration of Surah Al-Buruj — perseverance, justice, and the eternal reward of the believers. Reflecting on the people of the trench and the majesty of Allah as the Ever-Watchful.

title: The Questions of the Companions
short_description: A transformational journey through the questions of the Companions answered through the beautiful hadith of our beloved Prophet ﷺ.

title: Surah al-Baqarah Tafseer
short_description: Unlock the power of Surah Al-Baqarah. A roadmap to spiritual growth, clarity, and purpose — not just understanding the Qur'an but living it in everyday life.

title: Hollywood & Islam
short_description: How Hollywood shapes cultural narratives and moral perspectives — and what Muslims need to understand and teach their families about navigating its pervasive influence.

title: Prophetic Supplications — Compass of the Traveller
short_description: Living the daily supplications of the Prophet ﷺ — practical lessons on using du'a to bring mindfulness, spiritual consciousness, and a deeper connection to Allah into daily life.

title: Mankind's Journey to The Hereafter
short_description: Explore the realities of life after death in Kitab ul-Tawahhum. What leads to Paradise or Hell-fire, the soul's journey from death to judgement, and the actions that determine eternal reward.

title: Madarij As Salikin — Ranks of the Divine Seekers
short_description: A study of Ibn Al Qayyim's Madarij As Salikin — a classical text on the stations and ranks of the spiritual path to Allah.

title: Happy Muslim Marriage
short_description: Marriage is the union of two independent human beings. A course navigating the balance between Islamic guidance and modern cultural assumptions to help Muslims build a life of purity.

title: The Story of Musa & Firaun (Pharaoh)
short_description: Explore Prophet Musa's courageous stand against Pharaoh's tyranny — uncovering profound lessons of resistance, faith, and justice connected to the struggles of Muslims today.

title: Proofs of God's Existence
short_description: An incredible starting point for exploring arguments for God's existence — accessible, rigorous, and relevant for Muslims navigating faith and doubt in a modern world.

title: Fiqh History Explained
short_description: The evolution of Islamic jurisprudence — how early rulings developed, how the schools of thought emerged, and what this means for Muslims navigating Islamic law today.

title: The Life and Times of Salahuddin Ayubi
short_description: The remarkable story of Salahuddin Ayubi — his leadership, faith, and the liberation of Jerusalem. A study in Islamic history, courage, and purpose.
scholar: Shaykh Salman Younas & Dr Abdul Rahman Azzam

title: Tafsir — Surah Ahzab
short_description: Verses 21-27 of Surah Al-Ahzab — the Battle of the Trench, divine intervention, and the importance of trusting Allah's promises and following the Prophet's example in hardship.

title: Science or Signs? Qur'an, Science & The World
short_description: The primary miracle of Islam is the Qur'an. This course explores how to understand and convey that miracle in the modern age — bridging the Qur'an, science, and the natural world.
scholar: Shaykh Yousef Wahb & Shaykh Dr Sohaib Saeed

title: What Does It Mean to Be Hanafi?
short_description: Over a quarter of Muslims follow the Hanafi Madhab. This course explores its origins, its great scholars, and its continuing role in Islamic finance, law, and daily practice worldwide.

title: Tafseer Specials
short_description: Focused tafseer sessions from guest scholars — exploring the meaning, context, and lessons of specific Surahs. Each session stands alone and can be watched in one sitting.

title: Seerah & History Specials
short_description: One-off sessions from guest scholars on the lives of the Prophet ﷺ and the great figures of Islamic history. Each session stands alone.

title: Islam & Modern Life
short_description: Guest talks on faith, science, culture and the questions Muslims face today. Grounded in Islamic scholarship, relevant to everyday life.

title: Post Fajr Reminders
short_description: Short post-Fajr reminder classes from Shaykh Sulayman Van Ael. Start your morning with a few minutes of reflection and remembrance.

title: Post Isha Hadeeth Reminders
short_description: Short post-Isha reminder classes from Shaykh Sulayman Van Ael. End your night with a lesson from the Hadeeth of the Prophet  ﷺ.
